texto: [The] women's movement has been a blessing in many ways. [But] even as we have gained more physical and social opportunities, we are more spiritually and emotionally enslaved than ever in other arenas. Why? Because Satan has cleverly switched one form of oppression -- the undervaluing of women by men -- for another and perhaps more devastating form-- the undervaluing of women by themselves.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Wendy C. Top que provoca temas ligados a fe. Ao questionar “[The] women's movement has been a blessing in many ways. [But] even as we have gained more physic…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, men, women, com foco em women e women-s-rights.
